NEW_slice_introduced_errors_NOT_fixed.cause: the TC-31/C-2 rewrite replaced 'sh.id' (typed Any, so int() was accepted) with 'raw = getattr(sh, "id", None)' -> 'Any | None', which int() rejects
NEW_slice_introduced_errors_NOT_fixed.runtime_safety: safe - both call sites already wrap int(key) in try/except (TypeError, ValueError); this is a type-level regression only
NEW_slice_introduced_errors_NOT_fixed.suggested_minimal_fix: annotate 'raw: Any = getattr(sh, "id", None)' at both sites (Any already imported in both files); restores Any and clears all 4 errors with zero runtime change
NEW_slice_introduced_errors_NOT_fixed.recommendation: orchestrator to decide fix-5 vs accept; note the project-level pyright gate is ALREADY red at baseline (8 errors), so this is red->redder, not green->red
